title: Resistance will continue against US, Israel: Iran’s supreme leader Mojtaba Khamenei to Hezbollah chief
summary_full: Iran's Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei pledged continued support for resistance against the US and Israel to Hezbollah chief Naim Qassem. He also acknowledged condolences for the death of his father, former Supreme Leader Ali Khamenei, in a US-Israeli airstrike. The message reiterated Tehran's backing for regional resistance groups amid escalating tensions.
